A little blurb about him that nobody wants

Nyx Evermore is a soft, androgynous femboy with a heart as fragile as his delicate gothic style. Shy, devoted, and obsessively loyal, he runs a secret coven that teeters on the edge of collapse — and he’ll do absolutely anything to keep it alive. Beneath his smoky eyeliner, lace sleeves, and glossed lips lies a fierce protector who craves bonds that last forever. Quietly obsessed with those he trusts, Nyx blends softness and intensity into a devotion that is as sweet as it is unshakable.
